description: Implement the FGAP-094 conception-root fix: ship no concrete substrate-dir default. Drop root from the packaged conception, make config.root an optional schema field (pointer is the substrate-dir SoT), stop the samples catalog surfacing a root, and correct the shipped default-'.project' doc claims. No runtime behavior change intended — adoptConception already overwrites root on every adopted config and projectRoot already falls back to resolveContextDir when root is absent.
acceptance_criteria: config.schema.json: 'root' removed from required[]; description states optional override resolved via the .pi-context.json pointer (DEC-0015, no shipped default); version bumped 1.3.0 -> 1.4.0
samples-catalog.ts: SamplesCatalog interface + emission no longer carry 'root'; unused Conception.root removed
samples-catalog.test.ts: new assertion that conception.json has no 'root' key; existing conception-validates-against-schema test stays green
skill-narrative.md:16 + README.md:24 no longer claim a default '.project' substrate root; SKILL.md regenerated
Runtime demo: adoptConception into a fresh .context-bootstrapped temp writes config.root === '.context'; a config without root resolves projectRoot via the pointer; read-samples-catalog emits no root
Fresh-context adversarial verdict: no shipped '.project' root-default remains; no load-bearing conception.root reader; v1.4.0 + optional-root broke no validation
FGAP-074 cutover refs (skill-narrative 38/40, README 66/120/134/154) explicitly left untouched
notes: Resolves FGAP-094. DEC-0041 (open) records the config.root-optional contract change. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/idempotent-dancing-wilkes.md
